title: ArcInspector Search
description:
ArcInspector Search

ArcInspector Search

The image below shows part of a round object with a defect.

The ArcInspector finds the defect as shown below.  Note that each edge search position distance from the arc being inspected must exceed either the DefectLevelThreshPos or DefectLevelThreshNeg property values for a defect to be found.  Also, the defect area must be greater then MinArea and less then MaxArea.
